name: Tenor Creative - GHL Fallback
_doc: Reproducible export of the n8n zero-loss fallback for the tenorcreative.com contact form (brochure-site-transform Phase 4.6 / Variant B). The contact Pages Function (functions/_lib/ghl.ts notifyFallback) POSTs an HMAC-SHA256-signed {type,lead,error,timestamp} payload here when the GHL write fails; n8n verifies the signature and emails the lead via the shared 'Resend PPMC notify.' credential so no lead is lost. SECRETS REDACTED — set the HMAC Verify SECRET to the same value as the Cloudflare Pages secret N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET before activating. Live workflow id (PPMC n8n): <workflow-id>; webhook path /webhook/tenor-ghl-fallback.

parameters.jsonBody:
={ "from": "Tenor Creative Alerts ", "to": ["seth@tenorcreative.com"], "cc": ["seth@pricklypearmarketingco.com"], "subject": "⚠️ SERVER ERROR — {{ $json.lead.firstName }} {{ $json.lead.lastName }} — tenorcreative.com form", "html": "

⚠️ Server error — tenorcreative.com form

A visitor submitted the Tenor Creative contact form but the server hit a configuration error. The visitor saw an error and may retry.

Name: {{ $json.lead.firstName }} {{ $json.lead.lastName }}
Email: {{ $json.lead.email }}
Company: {{ $json.lead.company }}
Message: {{ $json.lead.message }}

Error: {{ $json.error }} · {{ $json.timestamp }}

Action: Check CF Pages env vars / secrets for tenor-creative-site.

" }

={ "from": "Tenor Creative Alerts ", "to": ["seth@tenorcreative.com"], "cc": ["seth@pricklypearmarketingco.com"], "reply_to": "{{ $json.lead.email }}", "subject": "🔔 LEAD RECOVERY — {{ $json.lead.firstName }} {{ $json.lead.lastName }} — tenorcreative.com form", "html": "

🔔 Lead recovery required — tenorcreative.com

The contact form accepted a lead but the GHL CRM write failed. The visitor saw success and expects follow-up — add to GHL manually (Sales Pipeline 1 → Lead).

Name: {{ $json.lead.firstName }} {{ $json.lead.lastName }}
Email: {{ $json.lead.email }}
Company: {{ $json.lead.company }}
Message: {{ $json.lead.message }}

GHL error: {{ $json.error }} · {{ $json.timestamp }}

" }
